name: Southland Holdings, Inc.
sic_description: Heavy Construction Other Than Bldg Const - Contractors
summary: Southland Holdings, Inc. is a holding company operating through consolidated subsidiaries. Based on the filing, the company provides services across infrastructure and construction-related sectors, including renewable energy sectors. The company references monetization of services, expansion into new business lines, and management of contractual obligations, suggesting it operates as a multi-segment services and construction firm listed on NYSE American.
